title: Persist local route history with evidence
action: Implement localStorage route persistence per grill Q5.2 (revising original 'latest 10' to 20-cap FIFO). Define SavedRoute with id, name, createdAt, favorite, scenarioId, selectedCommandNodes, primaryRecommendations, secondaryRecommendations, recommendationReasons, sourceRefs, schemaVersion, and ruleVersion. Use localStorage key maestro-wiki.saved-routes.v1. recent (non-favorite) routes capped at 20 with FIFO eviction (RECENT_ROUTE_CAP=20); favorites have no cap. Each entry MUST store recommendation evidence (scenario choice, selected command nodes, primary+secondary recommendations, recommendation reasons, sourceRefs) and MUST NOT store canvas absolute coordinates. Read/write MUST be fault-tolerant: on localStorage quota-exceeded/disabled/security-error, degrade to in-session memory (Map or array). Saved routes access UI MUST NOT reintroduce a permanent large right sidebar; use an in-canvas floating entry or popover trigger to keep canvas pure.
implementation: In src/main.tsx: define 'type SavedRoute' with fields id, name, createdAt (ISO string), favorite (boolean), scenarioId, selectedCommandNodes (string[]), primaryRecommendations, secondaryRecommendations, recommendationReasons (string[]), sourceRefs (SourceRef[]), schemaVersion (number), ruleVersion (string). MUST NOT include canvas x/y coordinate fields.

Add storage helpers loadSavedRoutes(): SavedRoute[] | null, saveRoute(route: SavedRoute): void, toggleFavorite(id: string): void, pruneRecentRoutes(routes: SavedRoute[]): SavedRoute[] applying RECENT_ROUTE_CAP=20 FIFO eviction to non-favorite entries while preserving all favorites.
Use single localStorage key 'maestro-wiki.saved-routes.v1'; JSON.stringify the SavedRoute[] array.

Wrap all localStorage access in try/catch (catching QuotaExceededError, SecurityError, and general exceptions); on failure, fall back to a module-level session memory store (e.g. let sessionStore: SavedRoute[] = []) and continue operating.
Render saved routes access via an in-canvas floating button or popover trigger (reusing TASK-002 floating-button style); MUST NOT reintroduce a permanent right sidebar or detail-panel-like aside.

Add unit tests in src/main.test.tsx: assert RECENT_ROUTE_CAP=20 cap on recent routes (insert 25 non-favorite, expect 20 retained, oldest evicted), assert favorites preserved beyond 20 cap, assert evidence fields (sourceRefs/recommendationReasons) retained, assert fallback to session memory when localStorage throws.

criteria: src/main.tsx contains 'RECENT_ROUTE_CAP' set to 20 or '20' as recent cap
src/main.tsx contains fallback to session memory on localStorage failure (try/catch with sessionStore or in-memory fallback)
src/main.tsx 'type SavedRoute' definition block contains none of 'canvasX', 'canvasY', 'absoluteX', 'absoluteY' (no canvas coordinate fields)
[UI-observable] npm run test:e2e exits 0 and verifies saved-routes floating entry renders and opens routes list without reintroducing a permanent right sidebar
